navigation.archive_path: seed → Archive link in nav (http://arizonajournal.org/archive/) → Repository link → /handle/10150/679294 lists all articles in vol 42 no 2
navigation.notes: The site runs WordPress for the site front‑page, but all article metadata and PDFs are served by a DSpace repository under repository.arizona.edu. Each volume/issue is a handle URL; the volume page lists all article entries. Each article page includes meta tags for title, author, date, volume/issue, and a direct PDF URL. No pagination on volume pages – all items displayed. No separate online‑only section; the repository is the authoritative archive.
